creator: wolman@cs.washington.edu
text:
I have created a patch to upgrade the exmh2 port from version 2.1.0
to version 2.1.1.  This patch also adds a few missing files to
the PLIST, and it removes a hard-coded version number from the
PLIST which will make upgrading easier next time.

You can download the patch from
http://www.cs.washington.edu/homes/wolman/exmh2.patch

I sent this patch to the port maintainer a week and a half ago,
but haven't heard anything so I thought I'd submit it here.

Fix: 

n/a
How-To-Repeat: n/a
